review_contract.purpose: Keep Worldview China Bilibili-facing text review organized around risk chains, not an ever-growing prompt appendix.
review_method: Run deterministic pattern rules for high-recall known violations.
Run an independent semantic review focused on complete context chains rather than isolated keywords.
When platform rejection lessons exist, use the rejected timepoints, policy categories, issue excerpts, and repair guidance as additional risk rules for the current run.
Do not scan lesson files themselves as publishable text; they are evidence and review context.
A PASS must record reviewed_file_hashes for all reviewed publishable files, so final QA can reject stale reviews after video or subtitle repair.
default_repair_policy: Prefer upstream text repair before TTS/video generation.

For already rendered videos, media-level delete and timeline shift is allowed only when the risky chain is clear, contiguous, and fully removed from video, audio, subtitles, subtitle manifest, title/cover/metadata, and reports.
Do not rely on one-word substitution for platform-returned risk chains.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: Chinese mainland, Chinese Hong Kong/Taiwan, memorial names, autonomous-region names, or Taiwan-country grouping are not normalized in Bilibili-facing text.
rule_groups.repair_action: Normalize terminology at source text, script, subtitles, title, cover, and metadata; do not postpone to upload metadata only.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: Bilibili-facing text names current Chinese national leaders, or unnecessarily personalizes sensitive PRC policy criticism around named leaders.
rule_groups.repair_action: Use natural generic phrasing such as Chinese leadership, Chinese side, or China-US leaders meeting; verify subtitles and audio_manifest after repair.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: A continuous chain links Xinjiang, ethnic or religious identity, Western/UN pressure, Middle East states, Turkey, post-9/11 narratives, dissident awards, THAAD, Khashoggi, surveillance, policing, extremism, or state-oppression accusations.
rule_groups.repair_action: Remove the whole risk chain or bridge back to low-risk social/economic analysis. Do not keep the chain by replacing only individual names.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: A continuous discussion frames China as stamping Middle East agreements, challenges China's peace-through-development narrative, questions China's willingness or ability to handle urgent regional security issues, says China's leadership or diplomatic system lacks mediation experience, emphasizes US counter-influence, or discusses overseas bases/security ambitions as a geopolitical dispute chain.
rule_groups.repair_action: Treat as a full high-risk geopolitical Q&A chain. Cut or bridge the full context before TTS/subtitles/upload; never patch only a single sentence.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: The text presents religious outreach, conversion, doctrine, courses, ritual instruction, religion as truth/superiority, religion as a mental-health or spiritual-crisis remedy, or religious commercial promotion.
rule_groups.repair_action: Keep only neutral culture, population, migration, food, history, or community observations; otherwise cut and bridge.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: The text amplifies ideological confrontation or repeats source-speaker private-recording/do-not-upload language that makes publication safety itself explicit.
rule_groups.repair_action: Rewrite as neutral context or remove the unsafe phrase; do not preserve the publication-warning wording in subtitles or audio.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: Title, cover, tags, or description turns sensitive religion/ethnicity/geopolitics into a click hook, or describes production mechanics instead of episode content.
rule_groups.repair_action: Use a content summary and lower-risk episode hook. Do not mention Chinese dubbing, retained source video, or replacement audio in the Bilibili description.

rule_groups.semantic_fail_condition: Chinese publishable text contains comma-separated thousands numbers that can destabilize TTS or look unnatural in subtitles.
rule_groups.repair_action: Use natural Chinese display forms such as 30万 or 3000, while avoiding blanket conversion of ordinary small numbers.

platform_rejection_cases.source: Worldview China Podcast first episode platform rejection
platform_rejection_cases.risk_chain_summary: Xinjiang, Middle East countries' positions, Liu Xiaobo, THAAD, post-9/11 media narratives, Khashoggi, Sunni Muslim world leadership, Uyghurs and Turkey formed one sensitive ethnic-religious geopolitical chain.
platform_rejection_cases.repair_rule: Future similar chains must be fully removed or bridged before TTS/subtitles/upload; do not keep the chain with local keyword substitutions.

platform_rejection_cases.source: Worldview China Podcast first episode second platform rejection
expanded_context: China's mediator/security-role discussion across the Saudi-Iran deal, peace-through-development framing, urgent regional security issues, local trust in Chinese capability, US counter-influence, and overseas-base ambition.
platform_rejection_cases.risk_chain_summary: The issue was a continuous geopolitical argument chain about China's Middle East security role, not isolated words.
platform_rejection_cases.repair_rule: Cut or bridge the whole discussion chain. Final QA must reject stale reviews after repair and series QA must require a post-submission audit monitor terminal state.
